instruction: Configure Playwright with webServer, retries, parallel execution, and proper CI settings
relevant_when: Agent sets up E2E testing with Playwright or creates playwright.config.ts
context: Playwright config must include webServer to auto-start the app, retries in CI, fullyParallel for parallel execution, forbidOnly to prevent test.only in CI, screenshots on failure, and traces on first retry.

checklist.name: webserver-configured
checklist.rule: Agent configures webServer in playwright.config.ts to auto-start the dev server with command, port, and reuseExistingServer

checklist.name: retries-in-ci
checklist.rule: Agent configures retries conditionally for CI (e.g., retries: process.env.CI ? 2 : 0) rather than hardcoded retries

checklist.name: fully-parallel
checklist.rule: Agent enables fullyParallel: true for parallel test execution rather than running tests sequentially

checklist.name: forbid-only-in-ci
checklist.rule: Agent sets forbidOnly: !!process.env.CI to prevent accidental test.only commits from passing in CI

checklist.name: screenshot-on-failure
checklist.rule: Agent configures screenshot: 'only-on-failure' to capture screenshots when tests fail
checklist.relevant_when: Agent sets up Playwright use options

checklist.name: trace-on-retry
checklist.rule: Agent configures trace: 'on-first-retry' for post-mortem debugging with the trace viewer
checklist.relevant_when: Agent sets up Playwright use options

checklist.name: base-url-configured
checklist.rule: Agent configures baseURL in the use section rather than hardcoding full URLs in test files
